notas.titulo: Toyota's Fake Manual For EVs Might Be Too Real
notas.descripcion: Toyota has filed a patent that simulates an engine stall in an electric vehicle.

notas.titulo: California Wants To Regulate Fun Tires (Update)
notas.descripcion: California is trying to regulate tire rolling resistance to reduce statewide fuel consumption, and it could limit enthusiast tire choices.

notas.titulo: Ford Defends Killing Sedans: It 'Absolutely' Was The Right Decision
notas.descripcion: It allowed the company to invest in the Maverick and Bronco Sport while expanding the Raptor and Tremor lineups.
